title: Junior Investment Banker at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
